intro.titleEn: Support the Digital Preservation of Gu Yuan’s Artistic Legacy
intro.titleCn: 支持古元藝術遺產的數字保存
intro.bodyEn: This is a preservation-first digital museum. Future support systems will help sustain archive care, research access, translation, exhibitions, education, and long-term digital preservation.
intro.bodyCn: 這是一個以保存為先的數字美術館。未來支持系統將協助檔案維護、研究開放、翻譯、展覽、教育與長期數字保存工作。
intro.noteEn: Payment, ecommerce, auction, and checkout functions are not active. All support programs are being prepared for future institutional use.
intro.noteCn: 目前未啟用付款、電子商務、拍賣或結帳功能。所有支持項目均為未來機構化使用而準備。

records.descriptionEn: A future donation pathway for supporting archival preservation, digitization, research access, and long-term stewardship of Gu Yuan’s artistic legacy.
records.descriptionCn: 未來捐贈通道將用於支持古元藝術遺產的檔案保存、數字化、研究開放與長期維護。

records.descriptionEn: A future membership framework for scholars, artists, educators, museums, and supporters who wish to follow and sustain the archive’s development.
records.descriptionCn: 未來會員框架將面向學者、藝術家、教育者、美術館與支持者，共同關注並支持檔案的長期發展。

records.descriptionEn: A future institutional sponsorship pathway for archive digitization, scholarly research, exhibitions, translations, and public education programs.
records.descriptionCn: 未來機構贊助通道將支持檔案數字化、學術研究、展覽、翻譯與公共教育項目。

records.descriptionEn: A future museum shop concept for publications, educational materials, archival editions, and carefully prepared cultural objects.
records.descriptionCn: 未來博物館商店構想將用於出版物、教育材料、檔案版本與經審慎策劃的文化物件。

records.descriptionEn: Future programs may include research fellowships, translation initiatives, educational workshops, archive residencies, and digital preservation collaborations.
records.descriptionCn: 未來項目可能包括研究資助、翻譯計畫、教育工作坊、檔案駐留與數字保存合作。

sections.titleCn: 為什麼這項文化保存重要
paragraphsEn: The Gu Yuan Digital Museum is not only building a website. It is building a long-term digital cultural archive dedicated to preserving modern Chinese artistic memory, oral history, visual culture, and historical research.
Many important memories, artworks, and personal histories may disappear over time without preservation efforts.
This project aims to gradually preserve and organize these materials for future generations, researchers, students, and global audiences.
paragraphsCn: 古元數字博物館不僅僅是在建設一個網站，而是在建立一個長期數字文化檔案系統，用於保存中國現代藝術記憶、口述歷史、視覺文化與歷史研究資料。
許多重要的記憶、作品與個人歷史，如果沒有保存工作，將可能隨著時間逐漸消失。
本項目希望逐步整理與保存這些文化資料，讓未來世代、研究者、學生與國際公眾能夠持續了解與研究。

sections.focusLabelEn: The museum is currently focused on:
sections.footerEn: will be developed gradually over time.
sections.footerCn: 將隨時間逐步建設與完善。

paragraphsEn: Future founding supporters may become part of the long-term preservation community behind the Gu Yuan Digital Museum.
paragraphsCn: 未來創始支持者可成為古元數字美術館背後長期文化保存社群的一部分。
sections.listLabelCn: 未來可能參與的方向包括：
itemsCn: 於未來支持者檔案中致謝
sections.footerEn: Institutional supporter structure is currently under development.
sections.footerCn: 機構支持者結構目前仍在建設中。

sections.quoteEn: Every archive preserved today protects cultural memory for future generations.
sections.quoteCn: 今天保存的每一份檔案，都在為未來世代保留文化記憶。
